data.title: Four Seasons Hotel Toronto appoints Chelan Goonetilleke as new GM, leading hospitality at flagship property.
data.description: Chelan Goonetilleke has been appointed as the new General Manager of Four Seasons Hotel Toronto, taking on a key leadership role in shaping the future of hospitality at this flagship property. This announcement was made on February 19, 2026. Chelan's extensive experience equips her for this position, where she will oversee operations and drive the hotel's success.

data.title: Clean Harbors Inc (NYSE: CLH) beats Q4 earnings with $1.62/share vs. estimated $1.61/share & $1.5 billion sales vs. estimated $1.466 billion. CEO pleased with stronger results.
data.description: Clean Harbors Inc (NYSE: CLH) announced its fourth-quarter financial results beating expectations. The company reported earnings of $1.62 per share, surpassing the estimated $1.61 per share. Quarterly sales stood at $1.500 billion, exceeding the expected $1.466 billion. Co-Chief Executive Officer, Eric Gerstenberg, highlighted a strong finish to 2025 with increased profitability in both operating segments. The Environmental Services (ES) segment particularly stood out with a continuous expansion of Adjusted EBITDA margin for 15 consecutive quarters. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Travelzoo's Q4 earnings disappointed with earnings missing estimates by -100.0%, reporting EPS of $0.0 versus an estimate of $0.11. Revenue increased by $1.80 million.
data.description: Travelzoo (NASDAQ: TZOO) released its Q4 earnings report on February 19, 2026, at 07:30 AM. The report revealed that Travelzoo fell short of estimated earnings by -100.0%, with an EPS of $0.0 compared to an estimated $0.11. However, revenue saw an increase of $1.80 million from the previous year. Further details on Travelzoo's earnings can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: SciBase's Nevisense (EIS) now in US NCCN Guidelines for Melanoma detection, boosting its use; a major development.
data.description: In a recent announcement on February 19, 2026, SciBase Holding AB revealed that their AI-based diagnostic solution for skin disorders, Nevisense (EIS), has been added to the US National Comprehensive Cancer Network (NCCN) Clinical Practice. SciBase, listed on the Stockholm stock exchange as SCIB, is a prominent developer in this field. This development signifies a significant achievement for the company in gaining recognition and acceptance in the medical community, particularly in the United States.

data.title: Amentum will open new HQ in Reston, VA in 2027; signed 45,000 sq ft lease at 1900 Reston Metro Plaza.
data.description: Amentum, a prominent company in advanced engineering and technology solutions, is set to establish its new global headquarters in Reston, Virginia by early 2027. The company has secured a 45,000-square-foot lease at 1900 Reston Metro Plaza in Reston Station's Metro Plaza District. The office space is situated in a LEED-Gold certified building crafted by renowned architect Helmut Jahn, featuring a sixteen-story office tower. This location offers direct access to Metro's Silver Line, enhancing connectivity for the company.

data.title: TransUnion predicts positive growth in originations by 2026, as per Q4 2025 Credit Industry Insights Report.
data.description: New data from TransUnion's Q4 2025 Credit Industry Insights Report reveals key findings indicating the current state of the credit industry. The report highlights important numbers reflecting trends and insights in the industry during the fourth quarter of 2025.

data.title: Fortis Energy signs mandate with EBRD for 342MW solar project in Serbia.
data.description: In Amsterdam on February 19, 2026, Fortis Renewable Energy BV announced a partnership with the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development (EBRD) by signing a mandate letter for the funding of a solar PV power plant totaling 270 MWp. This project will include a 72 MWh battery energy storage system (BESS).

data.title: Travelzoo's Q4 2025 results: Revenue $22.5M (up 9% YoY), operating profit $0.6M, cash flow $1.5M. EPS data not disclosed.
data.description: In the latest financial report, Travelzoo® (NASDAQ: TZOO) announced impressive figures. The company's revenue saw a 9% increase year-over-year, reaching $22.5 million. The consolidated operating profit stood at $0.6 million, with a non-GAAP consolidated operating profit of $0.9 million. Furthermore, cash flow from operations amounted to $1.5 million. Earnings per share (EPS) were not provided in the summary.

data.title: Comstock signs 45,000 sq ft lease with Amentum at Reston Station in Reston, VA. Amentum offers advanced engineering solutions.
data.description: Comstock Holding Companies, Inc. (Nasdaq: CHCI), a prominent asset manager, developer, and operator in the Washington, D.C. area, revealed a fresh lease agreement at 1900 Reston Metro Plaza in Reston Station. The deal, spanning 45,000 square feet, was signed with Amentum Services, Inc., a global provider of cutting-edge engineering and technology solutions for challenging issues. This agreement signifies a significant development for both companies involved.

data.title: EpicQuest Education to offer graduate programs globally, targeting high-growth markets for substantial revenue in 3 years.
data.description: This partnership symbolizes a strategic move towards high-growth markets, expecting significant revenue generation in the next three years.

data.title: FDA clears IST's ONE TRAY® for 365-day storage, enhancing sterilization options; 2nd FDA clearance granted.
data.description: In Dayton, Ohio on February 19, 2026, Innovative Sterilization Technologies (IST) revealed that the ONE TRAY® sterilization container has gained a second approval from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA). This clearance marks a substantial broadening of its applications within hospital and surgical settings.

data.title: Wallbridge to participate in BMO conference in Hollywood, Florida from Feb 22-25, 2026.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, Wallbridge Mining Company Limited (TSX: WM, OTCQB: WLBMF) revealed its plans to attend the BMO Global Metals, Mining & Critical Minerals Conference in Hollywood, Florida from February 22 to February 25, 2026. The participation at the event signifies the Company's engagement with industry leaders and potential investors, presenting a valuable networking opportunity.

data.title: Child care now tops retirement as crucial workplace benefit for parents per KinderCare research.
data.description: In Lake Oswego, Oregon, KinderCare Learning Companies, Inc. (NYSE: KLC) has reported that child care has surpassed retirement benefits as a top workplace priority for working parents based on their latest data. The seventh annual KinderCare Confidence Index, in collaboration with The Harris Poll, indicates a shift in focus with parents now placing greater importance on child care for productivity, retention, and loyalty in the workplace. This index, which is a leading national survey, highlights the growing significance of child care services for working individuals.
